a^]tjaBc~rZi;t72)hlL.text:
How to use:

Use the "display" custom block to set all the info! Thats all you need to worry about. 

(Make sure to put a forever loop around it if you want it constantly updated!)


How to save:

1.   Drag the sprite into your backpack at the bottom of the screen, then go to the project you are using it in and drag it in. 

2.   Stop the project if it is running, then delete the ' text ' list in the data tab, then create a new list and call it ' text 'again, but make sure it is set to "for all sprites" 

3. You are now good to go!

How to expand:

Its easy to add more characters, just make the sprite and name it!
